title: Minecraft: Cobblemon Edition
description: Embark on a unique adventure in Minecraft: Cobblemon Edition, where the worlds of Minecraft and Pokémon collide! This modpack introduces a vast array of Pokémon, from beloved classics to custom creations, seamlessly integrated into the Minecraft universe.
body:
Step into a world where your Minecraft adventures are supercharged with the magic of Pokémon in Minecraft: Cobblemon Edition! This modpack is a one-of-a-kind blend of the iconic Minecraft sandbox with the thrilling Pokémon universe, offering an expansive experience that both Minecrafters and Pokémon Trainers will love.

Features:

Tons of Pokémon: Discover and catch a wide variety of Pokémon from all generations, each carefully adapted to the Minecraft world. From the fiery Charizard soaring through the skies to the elusive Mew hiding in the depths of caves, there's always a new Pokémon to encounter.

Custom Pokémon: In addition to the classic roster, experience brand-new, custom-designed Pokémon that bring fresh challenges and excitement to your journey. These unique creatures are exclusive to Minecraft: Cobblemon Edition, adding a layer of discovery even for seasoned Pokémon fans.

The Create Mod Integration: Dive into the incredible possibilities of the Create mod, which is fully integrated into this pack. Use mechanical power to build complex contraptions, automated farms, and even Pokémon-themed machines. Create your very own Poké Ball factories, automated healing stations, and more, combining the best of engineering and Pokémon!

Exploration and Adventure: Traverse vast biomes, each teeming with wild Pokémon, hidden treasures, and new challenges. Whether you're searching for rare Pokémon in a dense jungle or battling your way through a mountainous region, the world is full of surprises.

Building and Crafting: With an expanded selection of blocks and items, including Pokémon-themed decorations and tools, you can customize your world like never before. Build your dream Pokémon Gym, create elaborate Poké Centers, and design your own arenas to challenge friends and foes alike.

Multiplayer Ready: Team up with friends to explore the world together, trade Pokémon, battle in epic tournaments, or collaborate on massive building projects. The multiplayer experience is fully optimized, making it easy to share your Cobblemon adventures with others.
